summary: Full backend + frontend testing of Officina Meccanica MVP. Backend: 23/23 pytest tests passed (auth, users CRUD, work orders CRUD with role scoping, event lifecycle START→PAUSE→RESUME→COMPLETE with automatic status transitions, AI interpretation via Claude Sonnet 4.5 on PAUSE reason, live worker status, daily AI report, admin-only endpoint enforcement). Frontend E2E on mobile viewport (390x844): admin login → dashboard KPIs → create worker (OPERAI tab) → create work order (COMMESSE tab) → assign worker → logout → worker login → home shows LIBERO badge + assigned order card → order detail INIZIA modal → START event → timeline shows INIZIO. All critical flows work. Deprecated packages detected: expo-image-picker MediaTypeOptions.Images (should be updated).

react_native_issues.issue: Uses deprecated ImagePicker.MediaTypeOptions.Images. Deprecated since expo-image-picker 16.x; should be replaced with mediaTypes: ['images'] (string array) or ImagePicker.MediaType.Images. Reference: /app/frontend/app/(worker)/order/[id].tsx:82

action_items: Replace ImagePicker.MediaTypeOptions.Images with mediaTypes: ['images'] in /app/frontend/app/(worker)/order/[id].tsx line 82 (both launchCameraAsync and launchImageLibraryAsync calls, though only library call currently uses it).
critical_code_review_comments: Worker home fetches events for each in-progress/paused order client-side to determine current state (N+1 pattern). For scale, consider exposing a /api/workers/me/current-state endpoint. Not blocking for MVP.
AI call in POST /events is synchronous — a slow Claude response blocks the mobile action button. Consider background/deferred AI interpretation for better UX later. Not blocking for MVP.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'); consider migrating to lifespan handler when convenient.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_-prefixed workers and orders and clean them up. During UI test one worker (username testop_<ts>) and one order (plate UI<ts>) were created and left in DB with a START event (used for final verification screenshot).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend base URL: https://car-bay-flow.preview.emergentagent.com. Admin: admin/admin123. All auth-protected routes use Authorization: Bearer <token>. Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is idempotent (unique run id). Playwright note: React Native Web TouchableOpacity inside bottom-sheet modal footers (btn-save-user, btn-save-order, modal-submit) reports 'element outside viewport' with normal page.click at 390x844; use JS dispatchEvent as done in test script. This does NOT affect real users on mobile devices.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. Only deprecation warning (MediaTypeOptions) reported for main agent to fix.
